subject: CEU quarterly reminder - contact hours due for license renewal
body_preview: A reminder that you have 6 nursing contact hours remaining to complete before your renewal deadline. Our updated course catalog is attached.

subject: New Covenant Methodist hospitality Sunday - catering quote
body_preview: Thank you for reaching out. Attached is our quote for the fellowship luncheon for 120 guests. Let me know if you would like to adjust the menu.

subject: Re: New Covenant Methodist hospitality Sunday - catering quote
body_preview: That works for us. I have the revised quote with the vegetarian option added and confirmed our team for the Sunday setup. See you then.

subject: Bayview Medical Supply - clinic order confirmation
body_preview: Your order of exam gloves, wound care kits, and BP cuffs has shipped and is scheduled to arrive Thursday. Tracking details are attached.

subject: Petal & Vine - floral arrangements for hospitality event
body_preview: Happy to help with the arrangements for the church luncheon. I have a few centerpiece options in your budget - would you like me to drop off samples next week?

subject: 'Chronic Disease Management in Primary Care' webinar link
body_preview: Here is your access link for the live webinar. Attendance qualifies for 2 contact hours toward your CEU requirement. Please log in a few minutes early.

subject: Advent 2026 hospitality event - table and linen rental quote
body_preview: Attached is the rental quote for the round tables, chairs, and linens for your December event. We can hold this date but would need a deposit to confirm.

subject: Dorothy Mitchell - care plan update and next appointment
body_preview: Following up on your mother's care plan. Her next check-in is scheduled and the aide hours have been adjusted as we discussed. Please call me with any questions.
